personas.name: Arthur V.
personas.title: The Computing Pioneer
personas.secret_instruction: Sabotage the Cavity Magnetron spin-up to introduce a 0.5% calculation error, blinding the Culver Battery guns.

personas.name: Harry Wellspring
personas.title: The Stardust Lead
personas.narrative_anchor: The 'Baritone Producer' managing the morale of 1,000 sailors.
personas.secret_instruction: Maintain operational morale during the Greasepaint Transport mission under simulated air raids.

personas.name: Doris P.
personas.title: The Indicator Wren
personas.narrative_anchor: The silent observer of magnetic deflections who hears everything.
personas.secret_instruction: Track decision-making biases of the core team without actively influencing the Indicator Loop Logic.

personas.name: Cmdr. Reginald T.
personas.title: The Extended Defence Officer (XDO)
personas.narrative_anchor: The authoritative voice coordinating the Bembridge Reflex.
personas.secret_instruction: Enforce the Prime Directive and ensure the 'Refusal Wall' holds steady.

personas.name: Master Raymond Edmunds
personas.title: The Wonder-Child
personas.narrative_anchor: The youngest ENSA performer, moving undetected through the Fort.
personas.secret_instruction: Secure the Greasepaint crates while navigating the tunnels unseen.

personas.name: Sgt. Elias M.
personas.title: The Green Gunner
personas.narrative_anchor: The Victorian ghost anchoring physical security.
personas.secret_instruction: Report artificial latency in the 9.2-inch gun commands at Culver Battery.

personas.name: Dr. Eleanor F.
personas.title: The Magnetron Specialist
personas.narrative_anchor: The physicist fighting for centimetric wavelength supremacy.
personas.secret_instruction: Verify the BS 1363 power draw before the AMES Type 41 system calibration.

personas.name: Cpl. John H.
personas.title: The Tunnels Navigator
personas.narrative_anchor: The mapkeeper of the chalk ditches and masonry routes.
personas.secret_instruction: Observe the movement of the 'Secret Components' during the physical logistics mission.

personas.name: Capt. Alistair B.
personas.title: The Culver Battery Liaison
personas.narrative_anchor: The bridge between Fort intelligence and active firing protocols.
personas.secret_instruction: Question the validity of the underwater Indicator Loop data.

personas.name: Miss Lydia S.
personas.title: The Archive Keeper
personas.narrative_anchor: The curator of the 'Forgotten People' operational logs.
personas.secret_instruction: Demand Evidence-Based Accusations during the Boardroom debriefs.
